title: SQL SELECT, WHERE, and ORDER BY
summary: Query data from tables using SELECT, filter rows with WHERE, and sort results with ORDER BY.
content_html:
SQL (Structured Query Language) is used to query and manipulate relational databases. The core command is SELECT.

Basic SELECT

SELECT column1, column2 FROM table_name;
SELECT * FROM employees;  -- all columns

WHERE Clause (Filtering)

SELECT name, salary FROM employees WHERE salary > 50000;
SELECT * FROM products WHERE category = 'Electronics';
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE date >= '2024-01-01' AND status = 'shipped';

Comparison Operators

=  !=  <  >  <=  >=
BETWEEN 10 AND 20
IN ('A', 'B', 'C')
LIKE 'J%'  -- starts with J
IS NULL / IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY

SELECT name, salary FROM employees ORDER BY salary DESC;
SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price ASC, name ASC;

DISTINCT

SELECT DISTINCT department FROM employees;

LIMIT

SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 10;
